message:
refactor(engine): migrate ProofStore from BTreeMap to Vec backing

Replace the internal ProofStore data structure from
BTreeMap<EngineObjectId, SecurityProof> to Vec<SecurityProof> to resolve
JSON serialization issues where BTreeMap keys with the custom
EngineObjectId type caused serde failures during checkpoint
serialization.

All ProofStore methods (insert, get, remove, invalidate_epoch, resolve)
are rewritten to use positional lookup by iterating over the Vec and
matching on the proof's engine_object_id field. This trades O(log n)
lookup for O(n) but is acceptable given the typically small number of
proofs stored per checkpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
